Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}What do you want? I'm using my cell now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Talk to me when I'm not busy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Whaddaya want? What, you've never seen a cell phone?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Really? I've never met anyone who didn't know what a cell phone was before.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Man, the spammers these days annoy the crap out of me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Whatever assholes send this junk to everyone, I hope they send them to prison.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}This is kinda random, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Isn't it a pain having to reply to messages from people you don't care about?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Yeah, you got that right...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Sheesh, you're a patient one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Oh yeah, that girl who passed out? I heard she was by herself when it happened.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Seems mysterious, doesn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}I don't really care about other people, but if it's a mystery like this, I get pumped.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Like I can't rest until I get to the bottom of it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Three days in a row, we've had students at this school passing out. It's a hell of a mystery.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}I'm itching to know more... I should try looking into it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}I thought I could turn up some info, but I didn't find anything at all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}All three passed out, but they were in different classes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Different clubs, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}So my investigation isn't going very well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Partly because all their friends were those thugs...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}And I obviously don't want to deal with them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}I'm getting bored of calling people up on my phone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}It's fine for trying to kill my boredom, but to be honest, I've run out of stuff to talk about.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Coming up with new stuff to talk about is a pain, too... Ugh, this is such a buzzkill.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}I'm thinking about downloading games to my phone, but I don't know...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}They say it's cheap, but it all adds up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Got any recommendations?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Hmm... Okay, I'll try to remember that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}The admin of the site I'm checking out now is highly respected.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}I guess they come off as charismatic? Y'know, having a unique username and everything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Well, whatever. As long as the site itself is cool, I don't give a flip what kind of admin runs it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}I heard there's a revenge website, but... the URL is top secret, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}I'm trying to figure it out, so I'm looking all over the web on my cell.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}There's a local thread that seems like it has a lot of info on the site.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}But it's all garbage info...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}My friend asked me for the URL of the revenge website, but I don't know it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}But even if I did, why would I tell anyone else?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}I'd just keep it to myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}I tried out that card game for cell phones, but I couldn't get into it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}It wasn't hard to understand, it was just too simple.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Oh well... I'll try something else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}I'm playing a shooter on my cell, so buzz off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}I'm playing an RPG on my cell, so buzz off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}I tried out that shooter for cell phones, but I couldn't get into it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}It was too tough trying to dodge the bullets on that tiny screen.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Oh well... I'll try something else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}RPGs aren't that bad on cell phones.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}One game lasts for a pretty long time, so I guess I'll play it a little while longer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}I was just playing that RPG on my cell, but I think I'm finally getting bored of it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}I hope there are more good ones...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}What do you want? I'm using my cell now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}This season is so busy, I have to constantly call and message people...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}So talk to me some other time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}I used to take a picture whenever I saw one of those Apathy Syndrome people.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}I sent them to everyone on my contacts list, saying, "I found an Apathy Syndrome guy!"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}But now, they're as common as oxygen. It's a pretty scary thing to get used to.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Is it going to go away someday, or are we stuck with it forever?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Oh man, this sucks... My friend is into that cult stuff.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}He keeps texting me these stupid-ass messages![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}Like this one, where it just says "Nyx-sama" over and over...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 321}I've gotta figure out how to block his messages...[n]{f 1 1}
